summary: Phase 3 Time-Series AI Integration - All 24 tests passed. LightGBM directional forecasting model integrated into AI Trade Consultation system. Status, Forecast, Training, Metrics APIs all working. 46 features extraction confirmed.

timeseries_status_api.details: Returns model status with model_name='direction_predictor', version='v0.0.0', trained=false, forecast_horizon=5, feature_count=46, db_connected=true

timeseries_forecast_api.details: Accepts bars array with OHLCV data. Returns direction (up/down/flat), probability_up, probability_down, confidence, signal, model_version, usable flag. Untrained model returns flat/50-50

timeseries_training_api.details: Endpoint exists and handles gracefully. Returns error 'No historical data available' when no data present. Proper structure: {success, result}

timeseries_metrics_api.details: Returns metrics object with accuracy, precision_up, recall_up, f1_up, training_samples, validation_samples, top_features (all 0 when untrained)

module_toggle_timeseries_ai.details: Can enable/disable timeseries_ai module. Toggle reflected in status API (timeseries_enabled field)

details: Full consultation includes timeseries_forecast field when bars provided
timeseries_forecast contains: forecast (direction, probabilities, signal) and context (align_with_trade, risk_adjustment)
Untrained model returns 'Time-series AI: No confident prediction' signal
Context includes align_with_trade: favorable/contrary/neutral based on forecast vs trade direction

feature_extraction_46_features.details: Status API confirms feature_count=46. Features include: price action (12), volume (6), momentum (8), volatility (6), trend (6), pattern (4), time (4)

untrained_model_behavior.details: Untrained model correctly returns direction='flat', probability_up=0.5, probability_down=0.5, confidence=0.0, model_version='untrained', usable=false

critical_code_review_comments: LightGBM model properly initialized with 46 features across 7 categories (price action, volume, momentum, volatility, trend, pattern, time)
Model gracefully handles untrained state returning neutral/flat predictions with 0 confidence
Training endpoint requires historical data from connected historical_service (Alpaca)
Consultation integration properly adds timeseries_forecast to consultation result with alignment context
Shadow mode correctly logs timeseries decisions to Shadow Tracker
Feature extraction validates minimum 20 bars requirement
seed_data_creation: None - used generated OHLCV bars for testing

mocked_apis_list: Model returns neutral predictions when untrained (as documented by main agent)
mocked_apis.note: Training requires historical data from Alpaca service. Model will produce real predictions once trained with historical data.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Time-Series AI fully tested. New endpoints: GET /timeseries/status, POST /timeseries/forecast, POST /timeseries/train, GET /timeseries/metrics. Model currently untrained (returns neutral predictions). To train, need historical OHLCV data from Alpaca. Consultation integration adds timeseries_forecast field with forecast and context (align_with_trade). All Phase 1 and Phase 2 endpoints remain backward compatible.
